channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA and FIBA to take next steps toward adding a new European league, sides announce
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NBA may soon be significantly expanding its presence in European basketball, in the form of partnering with FIBA on a new league that the sides have been talking about for many years.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Don't write off future Cinderellas just because it's an all-power conference Sweet 16, coaches say
item.description: Nearly every year there’s at least one lovable underdog that rises from obscurity in the NCAA Tournament to capture the hearts of basketball fans and bust their brackets.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: State audit reveals Anaheim doesn’t know condition of Angel Stadium on Opening Day
item.description: A report from the California State Auditor found that the city of Anaheim has not been able to ensure that Angel Stadium, one of the oldest stadiums in the majors, is being properly maintained.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Valieva's attorneys accuse WADA of 'procedural fraud,' ask court to revisit her doping case
item.description: Attorneys for Russian figure skater Kamila Valieva are taking her doping case back to court, arguing the World Anti-Doping Agency withheld and altered evidence that could have proven her contamination claim during the hearing that resulted in her four-year suspension.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James tips in game-winner to lift Lakers over Pacers
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James tipped in the game-winner to lift the team to a one-point win over the Indiana Pacers on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA Tournament regionals: A look at Chicagoland connections, program history and more for the men's basketball Sweet 16
item.description: The 2025 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament resumes Thursday night, and it's down to the Sweet 16. It'll be the Elite Eight after the regional semifinals on Thursday and Friday and then the Final Four after the regional finals on Saturday and Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Flyers fire coach John Tortorella in midst of another losing season
item.description: The Philadelphia Flyers fired coach John Tortorella on Thursday with nine games left in another losing season for a franchise that hasn’t been in the playoffs since 2020. The Flyers are last in the Metropolitan Division at 28-36-9 for 65 points under the notoriously brusque Tortorella.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Numbers to know for each of the 16 teams remaining in March Madness
item.description: (AP) - The smaller the number, the larger the impact at this year’s NCAA Tournament. Arkansas, the No. 10 seed in the West Region, is the only double-digit seed still alive heading into the regional semifinals. All four No. 1 seeds and three of the four No. 2 seeds are still standing.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees kick off opening day with home game against Brewers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – It's baseball's opening day on Thursday and the New York Yankees are kicking off the season with a home game against the Milwaukee Brewers.
item.dc:creator: Kala Rama, PIX 11

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater faces online criticism following JuJu Watkins injury
item.description: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater has disabled the comment section on her social media amid growing backlash that followed JuJu Watkins injury in the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iga Swiatek gets heightened security at Miami Open after 'aggressive' fan verbally attacked her: report
item.description: Iga Swiatek, the top women's tennis player in the world, was reportedly given boosted security at the Miami Open after an interaction with an "aggressive" fan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears sign DB Nick McCloud to 1-year contract
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed defensive back Nick McCloud to a one-year contract, bringing his NFL experience from the Bengals, Giants, and 49ers to the team.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks to build momentum as FC Dallas comes to town
item.description: Real Salt Lake, having won on the road against the Houston Dynamo last weekend, will welcome FC Dallas to America First Field on Saturday night with a chance to start a winning streak in front of their home fans.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: How to watch Illinois' first-round NCAA March Madness matchup
item.description: Set for their fifth consecutive March Madness appearance, Illinois looks to build upon an up-and-down season as they open their 2025 NCAA Tournament run with one of the final first-round matchups.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: What to know about the 2025 California State Games in San Diego County
item.description: The California State Games, hosted by Sports San Diego, will return to San Diego County from July 17 to 20, featuring 24 sports and thousands of athletes from across the state and neighboring states.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, Fox 5

item.title: Guenther scores go-ahead goal in 3-2 win over Buffalo
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club scored three goals in the third period and defeated the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 at Delta Center on Thursday. Mikhail Sergachev scored twice for Utah (31-27-11), which has won five of its last seven games at home.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: What you could win if you filled out the perfect March Madness bracket
item.description: Elon Musk's "X Bracket Challenge" offers a trip to Mars as the grand prize for a perfect bracket, while ESPN's Tournament Challenge offers dozens of opportunities for participants to win money, and the NCAA's Bracket Challenge Sweepstakes offers two tickets to the 2026 Men's Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA's Boston Celtics to sell for record $6.1 billion to group led by private equity mogul
item.description: If the deal is approved by the NBA’s board of governors this summer, the sale would mark the most ever paid for a North American sports franchise.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: Derrick Rose to throw out first pitch at White Sox Opening Day
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox announced several highlights planned for their regular season-opening series against the Los Angeles Angels, including Derrick Rose throwing out the ceremonial first pitch on Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
